proofs.observation: Water observed within canal section FZ-05-CANAL-0001 during field inspection. Water remained present within the canal at the time of observation.
One dog observed within FZ-04 near canal area during field inspection activities.
HTC-2 sensor displayed indoor temperature 28.6°C, outdoor temperature 28.2°C, and relative humidity 75%. No ducks present during observation.
INF-GATE-0003 observed in closed position following completion of field activities. Access path secured at the time of observation.
Water observed within underground well structure WT-UW-0001-0002 during inspection. Water surface remained visible at the time of observation.
